narrative:
York TWP township has 3,305 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.2 percentage points.
